history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hello! How can I assist you today? Just let me know your order, and I'll check for allergen safety if you have any allergies.

history.speaker: client
history.text: Здравствуйте! У меня лактозная и глютеновая непереносимость. Нужен обед около 1848 ккал без молока и глютена.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hello! I'm sorry, but McDonald's doesn't have any menu items that are both lactose-free and gluten-free. For a safe meal around 1848 kcal, I'd recommend checking with a restaurant that specializes in allergen-safe options. Would you like me to help with anything else?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Хорошо, подскажите, какие блюда без молока и глютена подойдут под 1848 ккал?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hi there! I'm sorry, but McDonald's doesn't offer any menu items that are both lactose-free and gluten-free. For a meal around 1848 kcal, you might want to check with a restaurant that specializes in allergen-safe options, like some health-focused chains. Let me know if you'd like help finding alternatives!

history.speaker: client
history.text: Подскажите, в каких ресторанах есть блюда без молока и глютена около 1848 ккал?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: I'm sorry, but McDonald's doesn't offer any lactose-free and gluten-free options. For a meal around 1848 kcal, you might want to check with restaurants that specialize in allergen-safe meals, such as health-focused chains. Let me know if you'd like help with anything else!

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: You're welcome! Have a great day — and feel free to reach out if you need help finding safe meal options elsewhere. 😊
